text:
is a fictional character from the Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA novel. He was a member of the Japanese Strategic Self Defense Force. 

Profile

He was a Master Sergeant of the First Airborne Brigade. He participated in the raid at NERV HQ 3 years ago. His body was found 3 years later, but his corpse was a recent one, indicating that time flows different in the Chronostatic Sphere. Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA Volume 5, chapter 04 

History

Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA

Volume 5

When his body was found, a recent one, he was dressed in the JSSDF uniform. Misato decided to ask Lieutenant Colonel Kasuga about his identity, who came with a senior officers and a medical team to assess the body. They identify the corpse as a man who went M.I.A 3 years ago during the raid. Misato wondered if these evidences where fabricated but, the watch and terminal showed the exact date and time of the raid. 

Kasuga told her that he was indeed from 3 years ago, they had medical records of his broken arm from seven months before the raid, and the it was exact the same, implying that even if he lived through malnutrition, the results would be different. Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA Volume 5, chapter 04 

Misato theoryzed that Sakura Yoshio probably hold himself at Super Evangelion when it was inside the Sphere, at attempting to leave. She felt a déjà vu sensation that he shot her in a different future.
